embeds.title: A History major reacts to Morimens characters
embeds.description:
#morimens 

Welcome to the second edition, of me torturing Dio with a quiz: Analyzing Character design and visuals from a gacha game. This time the game in question being Morimens. A lovecraftian Card based roguelike RPG.

Socials:
Community discord:
https://discord.gg/xDn42B9ejT

twitter:
https://x
